state.next-action: CRITICAL SITE FIXES NEEDED — NEXT SESSION MUST START HERE. The landing page has multiple broken promises that have been requested 5+ times and never shipped to main due to worktree branch confusion throughout session 2026-04-09/10. Git state is now clean (main branch, no worktrees, 32 runs, 19 playable). PRIORITY 1 (non-negotiable, do before anything else): (1) Results section on landing page STILL says "Round 3 results" — must paginate across all rounds with per-round conclusions, filter by project and hypothesis, show TBD for unreviewed rounds. This has been asked for 5+ times. (2) The Loop section on landing page needs pagination showing different hypothesis loops. (3) Hover info panels on eval components in the Playable Archive — not implemented. (4) Hook error handling — gad-trace-hook.cjs should create .planning/ if it doesn't exist instead of erroring, manage log file size with rotation (keep last N entries), and the hook error message in Claude Code should log WHICH hook failed and WHAT the error was to a log file. (5) shadcn is available but underutilized — the site uses custom components when shadcn has chart, tooltip, popover, dialog components that would solve several of these UX issues. (6) data/ folder should be the pseudo-database for ALL structured site data — hypothesis definitions, graph data points, eval results, round conclusions, not just open-questions and bugs. Extract hardcoded data from components into data/*.json collections. PRIORITY 2: Round 5 eval builds exist and are playable (19 builds deployed). User needs to play and review them. Bare v5 playtest feedback from round 4 drove v5 requirements. Round 5 has UO-style auto-resolve combat + trait system with numeric values. Conditions: bare v6 (111K tokens), GAD v11 (107K), GAD v12 rerun (120K), emergent v5 (84K), emergent v6 rerun (97K), video v1 (33K). TRACE data is stub-only (no behavioral events — worktree hooks don't fire, feature request anthropics/claude-code#46279 submitted). Clone-based eval runner exists as workaround (scripts/eval-clone-run.sh) but untested. PRIORITY 3: Site architecture — use data/ as the single source of truth for all structured content, reusable components via shadcn, proper state management. Feature requests page live at /feature-requests. 5 starter repos published on GitHub (MagicbornStudios/escape-the-dungeon-*). The session-discipline skill exists but was not followed — dogfood failure repeated.
